description: Compare the drug-drug interaction safety of three EGFR inhibitors (Erlotinib, Afatinib, and Osimertinib) with the antiarrhythmic drug Amiodarone using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app. Create a markdown report at /sdcard/egfr_amiodarone_comparison.md with a table summarizing the results, including the Cancer Drug, Co-medication (Amiodarone), and the Interaction Color.
